free_text: V-51(N,GAMMA) REACTION IN THE KEV INCIDENT NEUTRON
TIME OF FLIGHT, 40.121-METER PATH LENGTH. TIME OF
FLIGHT EVENTS WEIGHED BY DETECTOR PULSE HEIGHTS TO
MAKE DETECTOR EFFICIENCY INDEPENDENT OF NUCLEAR DECAY
GAMMA CASCADES. DETECTOR EFFICIENCY DETERMINED USING
TWO C(6)F(6) BASED LIQUID SCINTILLATORS PLACED
LI-6 GLASS SCINTILLATOR FOR NEUTRON FLUX.
CORRECTED FOR ALL KNOWN BACKGROUNDS AND FOR GAMMA
ENERGY LOSS IN SAMPLE OF 7.4 PERCENT. VARIABLE
CORRECTIONS USED FOR NEUTRONS SCATTERED OFF RESONANCES
RESIDUAL BACKGROUND VARIES FROM 10 MILLIBARNS AT
2.5 KEV TO LESS THAN 1 MILLIBARN AT 200 KEV.
**** CAPTURE CROSS SECTION REQUIRES A CORRECTION
BY A FACTOR OF 1.0360 DUE TO ERROR IN PROCESSING
INCORRECT DATA LINES REMOVED. BIB CORRECTION.
DATA LINES PUT IN MONOTONIC ORDER.
CORRECTIONS FOR SCATTERED NEUTRONS NOT MADE.
ASYMMETRIC ERRORS DUE TO ASYMMETRIC DISTRIBUTION OF
RESONANCE SPACINGS TAKEN FROM ORTHOGONAL ENSEMBLE OF
VALUE FOR SPIN = 3 ASSUMES THAT THREE SMALL UNOBSERVED
